title: Storage migration implementation review
reviewQuestion: Does the implemented SQLite-first storage package, sync bundle flow, runtime carve-out, and policy update truthfully satisfy tickets t-0044 through t-0049 without hiding important gaps or unsafe assumptions?
nonGoals: Do not require a PostgreSQL backend implementation yet; review readiness and semantic portability only.
Do not review unrelated packages that have not yet migrated to the new storage contract.
packetSummary: workspace:sqlite-first-canonical-storage-substrate; 4 focus area(s); 1 roadmap; 1 initiative; 1 research; 1 spec; 6 ticket
